creator: cmt@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 198755
thunderbird 60.3.0

the cycle starts once again, RC1 is up.

Easy patching.
 - patch-bug1474265, patch-bug1479540 gone (merged upstream)
 - patch-u2f-hid-rs62 updated from www/firefox-esr
 - thunderbird-i18n: language pa-IN is not available anymore from upstream (was already missing in 60.2.1)
